crop.title: Crop Video Online Free & Private | Clipy Studio
crop.desc: Instantly crop video online and change your video aspect ratio (16:9 to 9:16). 100% private free browser cropper—no uploads or sign-ups required.

howTo.d: Drag and drop your video directly into the browser.
Select a preset (like 9:16 for Reels/TikTok) or adjust the frame to center crop your video perfectly.
Click export to process your video locally at blazing-fast speeds.

crop.whyTitle: Why Use Our Free Browser Cropper?
crop.whyDesc: Unlike traditional video editors that force you to wait for slow server uploads, Clipy Studio uses advanced WebAssembly (WASM) technology. This means you can crop video online instantly using your own device's processing power. There are no file size limits, no hidden fees, and absolute privacy guaranteed.

faqs.q: Can I convert a 16:9 landscape video to 9:16 vertical?
faqs.a: Yes! Our tool is specifically designed to convert 16:9 to 9:16 effortlessly. Just upload your landscape video, select the 9:16 preset, and drag the frame to center crop the video on your subject.

faqs.q: Is it safe to change my video aspect ratio here?
faqs.a: Absolutely. We offer a 100% private environment. When you change a video aspect ratio on Clipy Studio, the file never leaves your computer. All processing happens right inside your browser.

faqs.q: Does this free browser cropper leave a watermark?
faqs.a: No. Our video crop tool is completely free and will never force a watermark onto your exported files.

watermark.whyTitle: Why Use Our Secure Video Watermark Tool?
watermark.whyDesc: When protecting sensitive or unreleased content, privacy is paramount. Because Clipy Studio operates entirely offline within your browser via WebAssembly, it is the safest way to add a watermark to video online. faqs.a: Yes, you can easily create a custom text watermark video. You have full control over the font, size, color, transparency, and positioning to ensure your brand is represented perfectly.

faqs.a: Simply upload your PNG or JPG logo file into our tool and place it over your video. Our processor maintains your original video's high resolution and framerate during the export.

faqs.a: No upload means no storage. Our tool provides a completely secure video watermark experience. Everything happens locally on your machine, so we never see, store, or have access to your files.

Choose the exact start and end times for your animation. Adjust the frame rate and quality settings.
Click export and our tool will instantly convert your video to a looping GIF.

video-to-gif.whyTitle: Why Use Our Video to GIF Converter?
video-to-gif.whyDesc: Most online converters have strict file size limits and painfully slow upload times. By utilizing local WebAssembly processing, our Video to GIF converter completely bypasses server uploads. faqs.a: Our tool lets you balance quality and file size. To create a high-quality GIF online that loads quickly, try reducing the frame rate (FPS) or lowering the output resolution before exporting.

gif-maker.howToTitle: How to Make a GIF from Images

howTo.d: Select and drop your image sequence into the browser.

Click export to instantly compile your images into a high-quality looping GIF.

gif-maker.whyTitle: Why Use Our Free Browser GIF Maker?
gif-maker.whyDesc: Unlike cloud-based tools that limit your file sizes and put your photos at risk on remote servers, Clipy Studio utilizes local WebAssembly power. This guarantees you can combine PNG to GIF or JPG to GIF instantly, with zero wait times for uploads and absolute data privacy.

faqs.a: Absolutely. Our tool allows you to upload multiple JPG files and stitch them together into a single, seamless animated GIF.

faqs.q: How do I control the speed of my animation?
faqs.a: Once your images are loaded, you can adjust frame delay settings in the control panel. A lower delay speeds up the animation, while a higher delay slows it down.

faqs.a: Yes, it is 100% safe. Since our GIF Maker Online runs entirely locally in your web browser, your personal photos are never uploaded or stored on any external servers.
